hypothesis: If the novel single-agent extraction pipeline is used for end-to-end extraction from ChemX nanozymes and chelate complexes articles, then it will yield higher F1 (and precision/recall) than baseline GPT-5, GPT-5 Thinking, ChatGPT Agent, and the domain-specific multi-agent systems, because it preserves document structure via marker-pdf, handles multimodal content effectively, and enforces dataset schemas.
